operators.name: recurrent_dim_scaffolded_readout
inventory_evidence: different families still reuse a smaller common scaffold of dimensions
object-memory overlap is wide, object-disc overlap is narrow, object-relation overlap is medium

operators.name: dual_overlap_transport_operator
inventory_evidence: object-memory overlap is wide, object-disc overlap is narrow, object-relation overlap is medium
restricted overlap has already forced readout to become path-conditioned transport

operators.name: family_low_rank_readout_operator
inventory_evidence: each family patch is low-rank and has its own reusable local basis
family low-rank axes have already entered operator-family design

operators.name: stress_guarded_write_read_operator
inventory_evidence: Q2 and Q3 have been rewritten as a stress-coupled write/read law
P4 has been expanded into a stress probe bundle

operators.name: family_anchored_bridge_lift_operator
inventory_evidence: bridge-role search has already been rewritten into a family-anchored role-kernel form
bridge lift is now jointly constrained by restricted overlap and family anchoring

verdict.core_answer: ICSPB now generates concrete operator families rather than only abstract structure claims.
verdict.next_theory_target: run falsifiable prediction synthesis and route the highest-priority operator to the next P3 benchmark.
